---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or workflow improvement for BakeBridge
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Colosyn

---

### 🚀 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g., "I'm always frustrated when...").
### 🛠️ Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you envision the feature working.
### 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.
### 🎨 Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or UI mockups about the feature request here.
